## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Stewart Mohammadi as a new director at growthx.ai and provide an overview of the company's structure, processes, and current client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Stewart will be leading a pod alongside Elvis, overseeing 4-5 accounts with managing editors and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Two new client kickoffs next week: GCAI (assigned to Stewart) and another likely for Jürgen](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Focus on iterative improvement in content creation, balancing AI automation with human refinement](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Smith AI identified as a priority account needing attention, particularly in programmatic SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Roles

  - [Directors typically lead two pods, each with a managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Moving towards a model with content managers one-to-one on accounts](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Pods ideally handle 4-5 accounts, considering complexity (e.g., multi-language needs)](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Managing editors and content managers should have a balance of SEO and content creation skills](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Current Accounts and Challenges

  - [Elvis's current accounts: Smith AI, exec, and Superhuman](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Smith AI: Struggling with programmatic SEO, needs urgent attention](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Superhuman: Early-stage account, focus on showing momentum](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [exec: Positive relationship with brilliant CEO, building custom tools](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Utilize Airtable for client workspaces (internal and client-facing levels)](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Step-by-step workflow for setting up client spaces and generating initial content](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Emphasis on iterative improvement and calibration with client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Goal: Create repeatable "recipes" for scaling quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

### Onboarding and Training

  - [Stewart to review training materials, particularly on setting up client workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Hands-on experience with Airtable operations recommended](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Focus on understanding assignment creation and article generation grids](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Additional resources available through Fathom recordings and Circle platform](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stewart to schedule meetings with Jürgen and Elvis in the coming days](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Review onboarding materials and familiarize with Airtable operations](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Prepare for GCAI client kickoff next Monday](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Dive into Smith AI account details and strategize on programmatic SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Explore opportunities for hands-on experience with different aspects of the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/6px6BxJGKM17kPVRRGzpjtFiWVVuCSLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
